name: WP-W2-consent-deletion: enforce consent authority, account-isolated deletion, and the fail-closed central age-gate
description: W2 (identity/consent/proxy/age, critical path) — enforce consent authority (MMT-ADR-0015) and account isolation on consent delete (MMT-ADR-0001); land the consent-gate semantics (F-029's semantic half, a continuation of WP-W1-authority-graph); rebuild the central age-gate (C-1) so it is fail-closed and not birthYear-only. Subsumes by construction F-118/F-122/F-130/F-145 (patched in WI-549 / WP-W0-patch-api).
acceptanceCriteria: Consent delete is account-isolated; deletion is atomic (inv 21); age-gate is central + fail-closed (inv 29/30); regression ACs — the WP-W0-patch-api (WI-549) break-tests for F-118/F-122/F-130/F-145 still pass against the rebuilt model. Findings: 1 new (F-093 account-isolation on consent delete) + F-029 continuation (semantic consent-gate, not re-counted). The age-gate group (F-130/F-145) is folded here as verification ACs per O §7 decision 1. Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W2-consent-deletion (commit 23d0c01ad)
riskImpact: M / risky — deletion atomicity + account isolation + age gating.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W2-consent-deletion)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 → "WP-W2-consent-deletion" detail block @ commit 23d0c01ad (eduagent-build) — the frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001).
Bundle rationale
Consent-authority, account-isolated deletion, and the central age-gate are the same consent/deletion state-machine surface on the new three-layer model.
Strategy
Enforce consent authority (MMT-ADR-0015) and account isolation on consent delete (MMT-ADR-0001); land the consent-gate semantics (F-029's semantic half); rebuild the central age-gate (C-1) so it is fail-closed and not birthYear-only.
Scope
In: F-093 (account-isolation on consent delete), F-029 (semantic consent-gate). Out: structural SCC break (W1 / WI-572).
Findings table
Subsumes by construction: F-118 (consent-authority IDOR), F-122 (deletion atomicity), F-130 (age-gate birthYear-only), F-145 (age-gate fail-open) — all patched in W0 / WI-549.
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
Consent delete is account-isolated; deletion is atomic (inv 21).
Age-gate is central + fail-closed (inv 29/30).
Regression ACs: the WI-549 break-tests for F-118/F-122/F-130/F-145 still pass against the rebuilt model.
Risk & blast radius
M / risky — deletion atomicity + account isolation + age gating. Depends on WP-W1-authority-graph (WI-572) + WP-W2-scope-rls (WI-574). The age-gate group (F-130/F-145) is folded here as verification ACs rather than a separate empty WP (master plan §7, decision 1).
